title: Garuda
subTitle: Pradeep is a dedicated police officer who deals with criminals swiftly. He soon locks horns with Mahaveer Das, a notorious criminal, and tries to crush his empire.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva and Parvati exchange garlands during the wedding ceremony. Later, Lord Shiva expresses his gratitude to Himavan for offering his daughter's hand in marriage. How will Himavan react to this expression of gratitude?

title: Toss
subTitle: Toss is a 2017 Indian Kannada romantic comedy film written, directed and co-produced by Dayal Padmanabhan. The film stars Vijay Raghavendra, Sandeep and Ramya Barna in the lead roles.The film, under the banner of D Pictures and Om productions, was launched by Puneeth Rajkumar on 27 January 2012. After being in development for more than 5 years, the film is set to release on 21 July 2017.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: As Parvati journeys towards Kailash alongside Lord Shiva, memories of her past life as Sati flood her mind, evoking a deep sense of nostalgia and reflection. Meanwhile, in the realm of the Asuras, a search ensues for a suitable bride for Tarakasura.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva and Parvati rejoice as the ten Rishis prepare to perform the sacred act of circumambulation around them as a gesture of reverence. However Parvati's joy turns to dismay when Rishi Bhringi declines to pay homage to her, causing her to feel.

title: Vedha
subTitle: A father and daughter embark on a killing spree in a bid to seek revenge against those who have wronged them. However, a police officer seeks to put an end to their murders.

title: Lakshmi Mahalakshmi
subTitle: Chandrappa believes that his daughter, Lakshmi, brings good luck and his second daughter, Anita, brings bad luck.

title: Chikkejamanru
subTitle: A sinister man tries to defame the village landlord and create trouble for the village. However, the landlord is determined to stand tough against all the allegations.

title: Neer Dose
subTitle: A retired government worker, a van driver, a sex worker and the owner of a milk stall lead an odd friendship as they try to navigate through their lives.

title: Ee Bandhana
subTitle: An old couple sacrifices everything, so their children live a happy life. However, they are forced to separate and subjected to ill-treatment and disrespect in their children's homes.

title: Operation Nakshatra
subTitle: Srikanta lives a seemingly happy life with his daughter, Roshni, and his young wife, Smitha. However, several incidents threaten to tear down their facade and reveal their true nature.

title: Operation Nakshatra
subTitle: Srikanta lives a seemingly happy life with his daughter, Roshni, and his young wife, Smitha. However, several incidents threaten to tear down their facade and reveal their true nature.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Mainadevi becomes displeased with Lord Shiva for bestowing Shivastra upon Tarakasura, despite the joyous occasion of Lord Shiva and Parvati completing their wedding ceremony.

title: Gadiyara
subTitle: The search for an ancient treasure unearths dark secrets about an old royal family. As the case progresses, individuals from different walks of life work together to find the truth.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Rishi Bhringi fumes with rage and announces his intention to separate Lord Shiva and Parvati. Meanwhile, Lord Shiva is disappointed and instructs Rishi Bhringi to rectify his mistake by accepting the truth.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Shambuki and Diti, driven by dark motives, conspire to invite Lord Shiva and Parvati to Tarakasura's wedding. Despite Shiva's refusal, Parvati accepts Diti's invitation. Will evil prevail over good?

title: Ee Bandhana
subTitle: An old couple sacrifices everything, so their children live a happy life. However, they are forced to separate and subjected to ill-treatment and disrespect in their children's homes.

title: Eradu Nakshatragalu
subTitle: A prince and a poor boy meet by chance and discover that they look exactly alike. They then decide to switch places in order to experience each other's lifestyles.

title: Aakash
subTitle: While working odd jobs, Aakash, a practical man, meets Nandini, a rich girl, who falls for him but he does not reciprocate. However, her brothers misunderstand their bond and make his life hell.

title: Bindaas
subTitle: Shiva, a petty thief, falls in love with Preeti, the daughter of an Assistant Police Officer. On hearing this, her father makes Shiva a police informer so that he stays away from his daughter.

title: Maurya
subTitle: Manu, a kick-boxer must train and win an upcoming tournament to fulfill his mother's wishes and to become the best in the world.

title: Prem Adda
subTitle: Ranganath and his friends are small-time criminals working for a local politician. After committing a murder for him, they are betrayed by the politician, prompting the group to seek revenge.

title: Prem Adda
subTitle: Ranganath and his friends are small-time criminals working for a local politician. After committing a murder for him, they are betrayed by the politician, prompting the group to seek revenge.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Parvati prepares herself to depart with Lord Shiva after their wedding ceremony. Meanwhile, Mainadevi becomes emotional and bursts into tears as she bids farewell to Parvati. Can Parvati console her before she departs?

title: Prayanikara Gamanakke
subTitle: A bus ferrying a motley of passengers gets hijacked en route to Hyderabad. Later, the police and passengers face multiple challenges to overcome the situation.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva's anger flares when Shambuki and Diti insult Goddess Parvati for her infertility and reject her blessings. Will the Goddess be able to soothe the furious Lord's temper?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Parvati joins Lord Shiva on a pilgrimage to Amarnath, seeking blessings for a child. However, their journey is threatened by Tarakasura's malevolent scheme, as he sends Rahu and Ketu to obstruct them.

title: Maurya
subTitle: Manu, a kick-boxer must train and win an upcoming tournament to fulfill his mother's wishes and to become the best in the world.

title: Thangigagi
subTitle: Veerabhadra who loves his sister very much gets her married to a nice man. But when Veerabhadra's close friend is killed, he decides to wipe out anti-social elements in the city.

title: Naani
subTitle: Soon after moving into their new palatial house, a couple begins experiencing paranormal phenomena. An investigation leads them to the chilling story of the house's previous inhabitants.

title: Yuga
subTitle: An orphan raised in slums, Yuga wants to earn a lot of money but not at the cost of his moral values. After bashing the underworld don and his gang, he moves to a village and there he meets Harini.

title: Neelambari
subTitle: Vinod and his TV channel crew arrive in a village for a crucial assignment. A series of spooky events is set in motion after they interview a mysterious woman who lives there.

title: Sugarless
subTitle: Lovers Venkatesh and Mahalakshmi lead a happy life and are about to get married. But chaos ensues when Venkatesh is diagnosed with type 2 diabetes and decides to hide it from Mahalakshmi.
